content: EF Core DbContext scoped service injection for global query filter: inject ITenantService into DbContext constructor, capture tenant ID in a readonly field (_tenantId = service.TenantId), use it in HasQueryFilter lambda. DbContext itself must be Scoped (not Singleton) so it re-reads tenant per request. Official MS pattern: ContactContext(DbContextOptions opts, ITenantService service) : base(opts) => _tenant = service.Tenant. Tenant value is captured at DbContext construction time (start of request scope), not evaluated lazily. For switching tenants mid-request, Transient DbContext lifetime works better than Scoped.
